# v1.6.0

## Features

- None.

## Bug Fixes

- Fixed Codex authentication detection for Automation Center and Agent Chat when `codex login status` writes the logged-in status to stderr instead of stdout.
- Fixed Automation Center Task Stack switching so Done, Ready, Running, and Needs me update their selected state immediately even while a real Codex projection refresh is still running.
- Fixed Task Stack bucket counts so switching to one bucket does not hide the counts for the other buckets.
- Tightened the real Codex automation prompts so discovery and task runs request the structured JSON envelopes that Automation Center can normalize into tasks, decisions, and reports.
- Aligned Task Stack row styling with the HTML prototype by keeping the rows compact, clickable, and visibly selected without showing the prototype-hidden description copy.

## Breaking Changes

- None.

## Maintenance

- Bumped workspace release metadata to `1.6.0` for the root package, desktop app, and Agent Chat package.
- Added unit and integration coverage for Codex login-status stderr handling, Task Stack bucket switching, cross-bucket counts, and automation prompt output contracts.

## Documentation/User Manual

- Updated the zh-CN Automation Center manual to clarify Task Stack switching behavior and the Codex login requirement for real automation.

## Verification

- `pnpm --filter @mde/agent-chat test -- codexAdapter`
- `pnpm --filter @mde/desktop test:unit -- AutomationCenterWindow WorkspaceFlowFilters automationPromptBundle appLanguage`
- `pnpm --filter @mde/desktop test:integration -- automationHandlers`
- `pnpm --filter @mde/desktop test:e2e:automation-center`
- `pnpm run lint`
- `pnpm run typecheck`
- `pnpm run build`
- `git diff --check`
- Manual real-Codex app smoke: launched the built Electron app with no fake automation adapter, kept `CODEX_HOME=/Users/trump.wang/.codex`, verified Codex capability as authenticated/full, switched Task Stack Done and Ready, started a Ready task through local Codex app-server, and received a succeeded report.

## Artifacts

- GitHub Release workflow should publish macOS DMG/ZIP artifacts and Windows NSIS updater artifacts for `v1.6.0`.
- Optional macOS signing and notarization secrets are not required for the no-paid-account release path; macOS artifacts may be unsigned if signing secrets are absent.
